---
title: "Jake Nielsen"
about:
  template: solana  # jolla  trestles  solana  marquee  broadside
  image: img/IMG_3546.JPG
  image-width: 15em
  image-shape: round # rectangle  round  rounded
  
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jake-nielsen-520a0a2a4/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/JakeNielsen17
    - icon: file-earmark-pdf
      text: Resumé
      href: https://JakeNielsen17.github.io/resume.pdf
    - icon: mailbox
      text: Email
      href: mailto:jrn101@geneseo.edu

---


Jake Nielsen majors in Mathematics at SUNY Geneseo. When not working
on Mathematics, Nielsen enjoys time swimming

## Education

Currently enrolled in the State University of New York at Geneseo, NY
Class of 2026

## Working Experience

Town of Islip Lifeguard | June 2021 - Aug 2023
